main_reference.description: User-provided single-character multi-pose body reference image.

gold_standard_scope.user_asserted_purpose: gold standard for body masking of this character across multiple poses

top_strip.description: partial upper-body / one-third-body pose reference strip

lower_strip.description: full-body pose strip with body-part mask overlays

layout_interpretation.validation_rule: Do not mark a body part missing because it is absent from the top partial-body strip; evaluate full body-part coverage primarily against the lower full-body strip and the labeled part overlay files.

does_not_by_itself_prove: promotion of unrelated target images without row-level evidence
